overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character exploring a rain-soaked urban street at night. The scene features prominent red and teal neon signage, abandoned vehicles, and a dark, atmospheric environment with heavy rainfall and wet reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked city street with neon-lit building ahead

events.description: character slows slightly while approaching abandoned silver sedan

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down wet street with flashlight illuminating the ground ahead

entered.detail: large curved building facade with prominent red neon lettering and teal accent lines
abandoned yellow taxi cab parked on the street side
dark-colored sedan parked in the middle of the approach path
rain-slicked asphalt reflecting neon lights and street lamps

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a rain-soaked city street at night, approaching a silver sedan blocking the path. A bright red neon sign illuminates the building ahead while a yellow taxi sits abandoned to the left. Heavy rain creates reflective pools on the asphalt surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered outdoor dining patio under neon-lit overhang

events.description: character circles around the silver sedan, moving under the protective overhang
moving under cover reduces direct rain visibility, neon lights become more prominent overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating around the parked car and moving under the protective overhang

notable_agents.action: abandoned silver sedan with flashlight beam passing over its surface as character moves around it

entered.detail: round white tables and chairs arranged under the covered walkway
building overhang with red and green neon tube lights along its edge

segments.scene_description: The character maneuvers around the silver sedan and moves under a covered outdoor seating area. The neon sign shifts to the left as the character passes beneath red and green neon tube lights. White outdoor tables dot the tiled patio area while the rain continues to fall heavily outside the overhang.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional park area between commercial street and dark woods

events.description: exiting the covered seating area into open park space with reduced neon lighting
environment becomes significantly darker as distance from neon sign increases, relying more on flashlight

agents.ego_description: moving through dark outdoor seating area toward tree-lined park path

entered.detail: leafless trees with twisted branches surrounding the pathway

segments.scene_description: Leaving the covered patio, the character enters a darker park-like area with scattered trees and outdoor furniture. The bright neon sign fades from view as the environment becomes dimmer, illuminated only by street lamps and the character's flashlight. The ground is littered with wet leaves and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between poster-covered wall and chain-link fence

events.description: character shines flashlight on wall covered with Hard Case posters revealing text and images
large abandoned truck temporarily blocks view of path ahead as character approaches

agents.ego_description: cautiously advancing along narrow path, examining posters with flashlight beam

entered.detail: brick wall plastered with overlapping posters reading HARD CASE with monochrome imagery
abandoned large box truck with covered trailer blocking the path
metal fence running along the left side of the narrow passage

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a narrow passage between a poster-covered brick wall and a chain-link fence. The flashlight illuminates HARD CASE posters on the wall before revealing a large abandoned truck blocking the path ahead. The environment is dark and enclosed with wet leaves covering the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: return to neon-lit commercial street with building entrance

events.description: emerging from dark park area back to neon-lit commercial street with visible signage
character slows approach while moving toward building entrance with glass doors

agents.ego_description: returning to the main street and approaching the illuminated building entrance

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi still parked in original position, visible again as character returns to street

entered.detail: the same large neon sign now visible again as character rounds the block
glass double doors with metal frames at the base of the neon-lit building
same abandoned yellow taxi from the beginning of the clip

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark alley back onto the neon-lit street, with the large red sign visible again on the left. The yellow taxi comes back into view as the character approaches the building entrance with glass doors. The environment returns to the wet, rain-soaked commercial street with reflective asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into a dark, enclosed alleyway before returning to the rain-soaked commercial district. It begins with the character walking past an abandoned yellow taxi and a silver sedan under the glow of a bright red neon sign, moving through heavy rain and reflective asphalt. As the character maneuvers around the sedan, the scene shifts beneath a covered patio illuminated by red and green neon tubes and dotted with white outdoor tables. The environment then transitions into a dim, park-like area where the neon fades, replaced by the beam of a flashlight cutting through wet leaves and debris before narrowing into a claustrophobic passage between a poster-covered brick wall and a chain-link fence. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness and the sight of a large abandoned truck to return to the open street, where the red neon sign and yellow taxi reappear beside the glass doors of a building entrance.
